zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar於1186年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾時，他的父親Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox26歲，母親Countessa Eva Menteith18歲。他於1230年之前與Marjory de Lennox在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1263年在蘇格蘭Forfarshire福爾法爾享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar于1186年出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾时，他的父亲Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox26岁，母亲Countessa Eva Menteith18岁。他于1230年之前与Marjory de Lennox在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1263年在苏格兰Forfarshire福爾法爾享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

en.lifeSummary: When Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar was born in 1186, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, his father, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, was 26 and his mother, Countessa Eva Menteith, was 18. He married Marjory de Lennox before 1230, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1263, in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar est né en 1186, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Countessa Eva Menteith, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Marjory de Lennox avant 1230, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1263, à Forfar, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar 1186 in Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox 26 und seine Mutter Countessa Eva Menteith 18. Er hat vor 1230 in Scotland Marjory de Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1263 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar è nato il nel 1186 nel Dunbartonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Countessa Eva Menteith, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Marjory de Lennox prima del 1230, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1263, nel Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrocharが1186年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennoxは26歳，母Countessa Eva Menteithは18歳であった。1230年以前にスコットランドでMarjory de Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年にスコットランドForfarshireフォーファルで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar(이)가 1186년 스컷랜드 던바토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Countessa Eva Menteith(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1230년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Marjory de Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 포파르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar nasceu em 1186, em Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Countessa Eva Menteith, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory de Lennox antes 1230, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1263, em Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilchrist de Levenax, 1st Baron of Arrochar родился в 1186 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Countessa Eva Menteith, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory de Lennox перед 1230 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1263 г. в местности форфар, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет.

Se casó con Marjory de Lennox antes de 1230, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1263, en Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 77 años.
